roa.docketEntryComment: DEF Notice of Request to Set Hearing on Diversion Motion (PC 1001.95)
Order - MVARS (Mobile Video Audio Recording Systems) Protective Order

/CAL 1001,95 DIVERSION MOTION/FTRRECORDED/DEF IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM/CTORDDEFENDANT IS FOUND ELIGIBLE FOR PRETRIAL DIVERSION PURS PC 1001,95 AND PC 1001,97/X: DIVERSION IS GRANTED UNDER THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS://X: 12 MONTH DIVERSION  PERIOD; 9 MONTH FOP; 1 MADD SESSION (PREVIOUSLY COMPLETED UPON PROOF TO PID);  65 AA SESSIONS (WITH CREDIT FOR 53 SESSIONS TODATE IF PROOF PROVIDED TO PTD); 8 HOUR TRAFFIC SCHOOL; NO RESTITUTION IS OWED IN THIS CASE; OBEY ALL LAWS; NO NEW ARRESTS RESULTING IN CHARGES; DEFENDANT MUST NOT DRIVE WITHOUT A VALID DRIVER'S LICENSE, REGISTRATION, INSURANCE, OR ANY MEASURABLE AMOUNT OF ALCOHOL IN THE BLOOD; WATSON ADMONITION/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/NGWD1: 1 AND 2/PTD:1 AND 2/CPSS/PROGPTD:02-07-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL HAS 977 AUTHORITY/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TODEMURR,/GTWM/MVARS/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:DIV PROGRESS REPORT/X:NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL,/DAWT/FAVRPT/PROGPTD:07-29-22/CONTD:DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PTD PROG REPORT/DAWT/FAVRPT/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/PROGPTD:05-16-22/CONTD:DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/FTRRECORDED/X:DIVERSION MATERIALS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT/CONTD:DIVERSION MOTION/DOP/
